portable_boundary: Homage-specific palette, glyph, material, transition, and provenance choices live here, not in the portable framework or the portable Screwm media-mount contract.

flat-live-camera-instrument.license_boundary: style vocabulary only; source media remains mount-specific

drift_interaction.shape_role: drift gives the camera instrument its visible substance without a border or backing plate

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: camera reads as a bounded instrument because of source role, scale, light, and drift, not because of visible chrome

spherical-attention-live-media.license_boundary: procedural material treatment; live media rights remain source-specific

drift_interaction.shape_role: drift and live media make the OARB read as the attention object inside the AoA

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: OARB reads as the fitted object-of-attention inside the AoA

regular-tetrix-face-control-atlas.license_boundary: procedural per-face control surface; no external assets embedded

drift_interaction.shape_role: each rendered AoA facet receives its own compositor/color cell; drift remains bound to the tetrahedral face geometry

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: AoA facets read as independently addressable information surfaces, not a screen-space overlay

live-authority-ticker-field.license_boundary: procedural text surface; quoted/source text must be separately cleared

drift_interaction.shape_role: ticker rhythm and drift define the field; no border or terminal frame is emitted

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: ticker reads as an in-world operational terminal field, not overlay text or framed chrome

material-reverie-substrate.license_boundary: procedural Reverie material surface; source media remains mount-specific when injected

drift_interaction.shape_role: Reverie receives its visible substance from the live compositor/drift field; no atlas cell, grid, or frame defines it

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: reverie reads as an in-world living material plane rather than a static reprojection

live-speech-waveform-field.license_boundary: procedural waveform surface; voice representation remains generated system state

drift_interaction.shape_role: raw speech samples define line path; amplitude affects only the local receiver line width and alpha

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: speech reads as an in-world oscilloscope field near the AoA, not a global scene pulse or overlay

ticker-operational-text.license_boundary: procedural text surface; quoted/source text must be separately cleared

drift_interaction.shape_role: ticker rhythm and drift define the field; no border or terminal frame is emitted

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: ticker reads as an in-world operational terminal field, not overlay text or framed chrome

state-ward-instrument.license_boundary: procedural state surface only; operator-specific ward content remains outside the portable framework

drift_interaction.shape_role: ward content and drift interaction define the entity; atlas storage and mount chrome do not

mount_expression.inspection_affordance: ward reads as a bounded in-world state instrument through role, scale, drift, light, and data cadence

room-floor-compositor-field.license_boundary: procedural spatial material; no source media embedded

surface_expression.inspection_affordance: floor reads as generated world geometry and drift-reactive light, not a filled or tiled texture surface

room-ceiling-compositor-field.license_boundary: procedural spatial material; no source media embedded

surface_expression.inspection_affordance: ceiling reads as generated world geometry and drift-reactive light, not a filled or tiled texture surface

room-wall-compositor-field.license_boundary: procedural spatial material; no source media embedded

surface_expression.inspection_affordance: wall reads as visual absence punctuated by generated light-grid/stipple behavior, never as filled wall material

distribution_boundary.portable_framework: ships generic contracts, projection math, engine adapters, audit gates
distribution_boundary.homage_pack: ships optional expressive mappings, provenance, risk notes, and theme-specific assets
